---
reference: inspect_ai.log
description: List, read, write, and analyse logs.
---

## Eval Logs

### list_eval_logs
### write_eval_log
### write_eval_log_async
### read_eval_log
### read_eval_log_async
### read_eval_log_sample
### read_eval_log_samples
### read_eval_log_sample_summaries
### recompute_metrics
### convert_eval_logs
### bundle_log_dir
### write_log_dir_manifest
### retryable_eval_logs
### EvalLogInfo

## Log Editing

### edit_eval_log
### edit_score
### invalidate_samples
### uninvalidate_samples
### LogUpdate
### LogEdit
### MetadataEdit
### TagsEdit
### ProvenanceData

## Crash Recovery

### recover_eval_log
### recoverable_eval_logs
### RecoverableEvalLog
### RecoveryNotAvailable

## Eval Log API

### EvalStatus
### EvalLog
### EvalSpec
### EvalDataset
### EvalConfig
### EvalRevision
### EvalPlan
### EvalPlanStep
### EvalResults
### EvalScore
### EvalMetric
### EvalSampleReductions
### EvalStats
### EvalError
### EvalSample
### EvalSampleSummary
### EvalSampleLimit
### EvalSampleReductions
### EvalSampleScore
### WriteConflictError

## Condense API

### condense_sample
### condense_events
### expand_events
### EventsData

## Transcript API

### transcript
### Transcript
